title: Icabu 4 modpack
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6011f4b3406efd535596d987cddf771792a498d.png)
[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03629e989e9744138963451f8877bb5d65aceea.png)](https://dsc.gg/icabu)[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df5ae65196aa7a4a0aef20e208c0005ff06471f.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/icabu-4)[![github](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14bb5f6380dbf0e9a0bc20179ef4d9728b0f88d9.png)]()
## About modpack
This is a modpack for the 4th season of the [**Icabu**](https://dsc.gg/icabu) server. Based on the [**Performium Reborn**]() modpack. Game optimization, longer render distance, bug fixes, optifine features like zoom, connected textures, support of shaders and a bunch of other QoL things


## About server
Icabu is Russian-speaking SMP

_**To play on the server, you need to submit an application on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/a88WGSDYtr)**_
